raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1287 eliminates the 'Pink Tax' on goods marketed to women and girls.",
    "The legislation is part of a decades-long effort to end gender-based pricing.",
    "AB 1287 prohibits price differentials for substantially similar goods.",
    "Price differences are allowed when goods have a significant difference in the cost or time to produce.",
    "The 'Pink Tax' is considered a gender-based penalty that harms women who are already paid less.",
    "The bill aims to ensure price equality in California."
